title: fraxinus ornus var. parvifolia
intro: Fraxinus ornus var. parvifolia is a variety of the Manchurian Ash tree, specifically a smaller, more compact form of the Fraxinus ornus species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Fraxinus ornus var. parvifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Fraxinus ornus var. parvifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
